name: Hilton Honors American Express Business Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 175,000 Hilton Honors Bonus Points plus a Free Night Reward after you spend $8,000 in purchases on the Hilton Honors Business Card in the first six months of Card Membership. Offer ends 4/15/2026.

earning_rates.notes: Earned on eligible purchases made directly with hotels and resorts within the Hilton portfolio
First $100,000 in purchases each calendar year, then 3X thereafter

annual_credits.name: Hilton Property Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $60 in statement credits each quarter for purchases made directly with a property in the Hilton portfolio

hotel_status: Hilton Honors Diamond status upgrade upon spending $40,000 in a calendar year
other_benefits: National Car Rental Emerald Club Executive status
Complimentary airport lounge access (10 visits per year - removed in 2024 overhaul)

sources.notes: NerdWallet 2026 review with annual fee, earning rates, benefits, and welcome offer details
Hilton Honors credit cards official page with current welcome offer of 175,000 points + free night
Amex official benefits page with earning rates and status information
